name: claude-official-profile-switcher
description: Unofficial: safely switch between multiple official Claude Code for VS Code accounts by snapshotting ~/.claude and ~/.claude.json into named profiles, with timestamped backups, validation and automatic rollback.
author: Faisal Sannan

commands.title: Claude Profile Switcher: Import Current Claude Account
Claude Profile Switcher: Create Empty Profile
Claude Profile Switcher: Switch Official Claude Account
Claude Profile Switcher: Save Current State to Active Profile
Claude Profile Switcher: Backup Current Claude State
Claude Profile Switcher: Restore Last Backup
Claude Profile Switcher: Open Profiles Folder

claudeProfileSwitcher.profilesRoot.description: Folder for saved Claude profiles. Empty means ~/.claude-profiles.

claudeProfileSwitcher.activeClaudeDir.description: Active Claude config dir. Empty means ~/.claude.

claudeProfileSwitcher.activeClaudeJson.description: Active Claude JSON file. Empty means ~/.claude.json.

claudeProfileSwitcher.reloadAfterSwitch.description: Reload the VS Code/code-server window automatically after a profile switch so the official Claude extension rereads the active profile.

claudeProfileSwitcher.maxBackups.description: Maximum number of timestamped backups to keep in <profilesRoot>/_backups (oldest pruned first). 0 disables pruning.
